summary: A disciplined 3-4-3 with a box-4 midfield that drops into a 5-4-1 — 2nd best defence in AFC qualifying. Will need to be near-perfect in a tough Group D.
style: 3-4-3 — box-4 midfield (2 CDMs, 2 CAMs), wing-backs going beyond, crosses into the box cut back to the box-4 CMs; drops into a 5-4-1 defensively.

counterReliance.note: Solid block first, breaks via wing-backs

strengths: Wing-backs beyond and crosses cut back to arriving midfielders

keyPlayers.name: Mohamed Toure
keyPlayers.note: Goalscorer (10 in 13 for Norwich at the end of the season), pace to run behind and power to hold up

tactics: Defend in a compact 5-4-1, then attack through wing-backs and cutbacks to the box-4 midfielders. Group D is evenly matched — they must be near-perfect throughout.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
